"[93] CT INQ IF UNIT CAN RESPOND TO SOUTH FISH CLOSURE - XRAY PANICED ABOUT OSN IN INDI "
"[92] 72-S1 - 72-3 ADV ONLY FIRE PERSONEL GOING THOUGH "
"[91] ICSO INQ IF UNIT HAS LET NB TRAFFIC THROUGH INDI CLOSURE "

"[83] CT MOVING NOW S FISH SPRINGS RD "
"[81] 72-S1 REQ CT HARD CLOSURE SB 395 AT S FISH SPRINGS "
"[80] A72-001 GRAVES 97 JNO LONEPINE / CLOSURE NB LNS"
"[76] C72-001 ENRT TO GOODALE F/ CLOSURE"
"[74] ICSO REQ HARD CLOSURE AT DIVISON CRK - ADV LINE 73 "

"[73] 72-S1 LL - 72-S3 AT DIVISION CRK REST AREA / 72-1 ENRT TO LP TO CLOSE NB TRAFFIC / 72-3 DAYS AT GOODALE // HARD CLOSURE AT TABOOSE // CLEARING OUT NB FROM LONE PINE UP TO KEEP THEM OUT OF THE SMOKE"
"[72] C72-001 ENRT TO LONE PINE TO CLOSE NB LANES "
"[71] BDU - REQ CLOSURE FROM DIVISON CRK TO LP - SIGNIFICAN RESOURCES INCOMING - FIRE EXTENDED 1400 ACRES "
"[69] BDU - IC REQ FULL CLOSURE NB AND SB FROM LONEPINE TO ABDERDEEN "
"[67] A72-011 97 W/ BREAK NB JSO DIVISION CRK"
"[65] 1039 72-S1 HAVE 72-11 DAYS SHUT DOWN AT LOCATION "
"[64] BERDU REQ FULL RD CLOSURE NB AND SB DUE TO SMOKE"
"[60] 72-S3 WIND SHIFT TO SW - 72-11 OPEN NB TRAFFIC BUT STAY 97 INCASE SHUT DOWN AGAIN "
"[58] A72-011 97 W/ BREAK AT DIVISION CRK"
"[57] 72-S1 72-11 WILL BE RUNNIGN A BREAK NB DUE TO WIND SHIFT "
"[49] C72-003 WHI HONDA PILOT GOING THROUGH CLOSURE - CAPT E-341 FOREST SERVICE "
"[47] 72-S1 CPYS LINE 45 - OPENING NB LNS FIRE NOT A THREAT TO NB LNS "
"[46] 72-S3 AIR EVAC LANDED - TAKING BOTH SB LNS "
"[42] 1039 72-S1 LL / ADVS KEEP THE CLOSURE ON NB FOR NOW / TWO AIRPLANES IN AREA / 72-S1 WILL ADVS ON OPENING SHORTLY"
"[41] 1039 ICSO LINE 39 - ICSO ADV REQ HARD CLOSURE "
"[39] 72-S3 ADV SO NB 395 CAN LET TRAFFIC GO - NEG THREAT "
"[37] C72-003 ALLOWING 1 SED TO PASS THROUGH PTYS WITH FIRE [Shared]"
"[33] 72-3 CPYS - HAVE GRAVEYARD UNITS GO WITH BREAK AT TABOOSE - CURRENTLY DIRECTING TRAFFIC SB IN #1 [Shared]"
"[32] ICSO - UNITS ADV HARD CLOSURE TO BE FOR TABOOSE SO WHEN REOPEN TRAFFIC CAN GO THROUGH TINEMAH [Shared]"
"[31] A72-001 BREAK SB JSO GOODALE TAKING # 2 LN [Shared]"
"[29] A72-003 PER SO - FIRE REQ HARD CLOSURE JNO GOODLAE FOR EVACUTAION ROUTE [Shared]"
"[23] 72-S3 ADV FIRE 97 SETTING UP AND WILL BE TAKING #2 LN - NEG 1125 [Shared]"
"[20] A72-001 STARTING A BREAK SB JSO ELNA [Shared]"
"[18] 72-3 97 JSO GOODALE RD - CT 97 - FLAMES PICKING UP APROX 100FT [Shared]"
"[12] [Appended, 16:30:53] [1] PER DUPE 3 VEHS ON RS TRYING TO PUT FIRE OUT"
"[14] [Notification] [CHP]-CDF 97 --- UTL ON ANY INV'D PRTY // ADVD 1185 WILL BE NEEDED"
"[10] VEH IS UP AGAINST A TREE // RP ADVD NOT EASY TO SEE FROM RDWY BUT ITS ABOUT 1/8 MI UP 243 NEAR A WHI HOUSE // IF YOU REACH THE PROPANE YARD YOUVE GONE TOO FAR"
"[8] VEH APPEARS TO BE 1124 -- RP DIDNT SEE ANY OCCUPANTS IN VEH // WAS ABLE TO GET A PLT 8V84612"
"[4] RP GOING TO CHECK IF VEH IS OCCUPIED "

details.IncidentDetail: "[2] 97-M1 BREAK WB FROM SUNSET -- CT CLOSING #4 LANE "
"[1] ,#4 LANE FROM PENN TO BEA AVE UNTIL 1500 HOURS"
"[16] 97-202 DOG NOT COLLARED/SPOKE TO NEIGHBOR NOT THEIR DOG"
"[15] [Notification] [CHP]-AC ADV VIA LL--FOR 1144 ANIMALS OO RDWY THEY WILL RESPOND DURING NORMAL BUSINESS HRS // DEPUTY ADV CALL WILL BE PENDING FOR MORNING FOR 7/21/26"
"[13] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 20002-Hit and Run No Injuries to ANIMAL-Live or Dead Animal by CHP"
"[12] B97-202 1144 DOG/START CORDS FOR MED SIZE DOG ON THE RIGHT SIDE WB LANE GUTTER"
"[8] NOW RP ADV NEG 1125 CAR PART"
"[6] RP NOW ADV THE DOG IS 1144"
"[1] DRY CLR STRONG GUSTY WINDS TA FOR ALL VEHS"
